secondary_archetype: Chief of Staff support / Operational Governance

level_signals: Reports to Program Manager, not managing direct reports
High autonomy expected; expected to build frameworks from scratch

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Bachelor's degree and 5+ years of related experience in Business Operations, Project Management, or Financial Services (or equivalent work experience).
Advanced proficiency in Google, Smartsheet, AirTable and Jira (or equivalent tool). You should be comfortable building complex sheets, reports, and dashboards.

Proficiency in turning data into 'the why.' You should be an expert in building not just dashboards, but the presentations and narratives that go with them (Google Slides/PowerPoint mastery is a must)
A strong interest in AI and automation. You don't need to be a coder, but you must possess a 'power user' mindset capable of leveraging new tools to automate manual workflows.
The ability to look at a list of 200+ projects and determine how to identify the three that are missing critical information.
Strong written and verbal skills; ability to collaborate with Project Managers and Pillar Leads to ensure data integrity.
A proactive, 'founder's mentality' with the ability to build frameworks from scratch in a fast-paced, evolving environment.

explicitly_excluded: Remote work from Hawaii or Alaska is not accommodated due to insurance coverage issues.

scope.surface: Global Business Operations / Operational Governance for Global Operations EVP's organization
primary_metrics_inferred: Operational readiness rates for SCI/LCI launches
Accuracy and timeliness of weekly reporting
core_responsibilities: Act as primary custodian of project data for internal and external audits
Analyze portfolio trends to identify systemic bottlenecks and craft executive narratives
Facilitate the global intake process to capture, sequence, and prioritize initiatives
Partner cross-functionally with ERM to govern Strategic Change Initiatives (SCI) and Local Change Initiatives (LCI)
Monitor capacity allocations and identify risks or bottlenecks within the portfolio
Own the holistic dashboard of operational priorities and maintain weekly reporting
Research and implement AI solutions to automate routine governance tasks
Structure and execute ad-hoc requests from senior stakeholders with high autonomy

green_flags: Explicit 'builder' framing — not a maintenance role, offers genuine scope to create new frameworks
High autonomy with senior stakeholder exposure (EVP-level)
Pioneer role in AI-governed operations — genuine innovation mandate
Clear reporting structure and team context provided
EEO and accommodation commitments explicitly stated
San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance compliance noted
red_flags: Compensation range is referenced but not actually disclosed in the JD text — cannot verify competitiveness
Location type is ambiguous — JD does not specify remote, hybrid, or onsite; only Hawaii/Alaska excluded
No explicit mention of equity or total comp structure
Posting date not provided — unclear how fresh the role is
